center.name: Palenque River
center.summary: The Palenque River is a river of Ecuador.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky pigeon is found in the Chocó Biogeographic Region from Colombia near the Panamanian border south to the Río Palenque in northwestern Ecuador
